message:
Refactor provider factory to typed route enum and add perf regression test suite

src/providers/mod.rs:
- Introduce ProviderRouteKind enum with 11 variants covering all
  provider implementations (native anthropic/openai/cohere/google/azure
  and API-compatible anthropic-messages/openai-completions/openai-responses/
  cohere-chat/google-generative-ai)
- resolve_provider_route() maps (provider, api) to typed route via
  canonical_provider_id() lookup, falling back to effective_api string
  matching for third-party providers using compatible APIs
- create_provider() refactored from nested string matching to single
  match on ProviderRouteKind, eliminating duplicated provider construction
  patterns and making the routing decision fully traceable in logs
  (route kind logged alongside provider/api/base_url)
- ~70 fewer lines by eliminating redundant early returns and merging
  native + API-compatible paths that create identical providers

tests/perf_regression.rs (new — bd-1f42.5.3):
- Automated regression tests against PERF_BUDGETS.md thresholds for
  startup latency, idle memory, binary size, and responsiveness
- Emits structured JSONL artifacts with hardware/context metadata
- Compares against stored baselines for trend delta detection
- Fails CI on budget violations; full mode via PERF_REGRESSION_FULL=1

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
